    Methods in org.jscience.social.sociology with parameters of type SocialNetwork
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Real
    SocialCapitalModel.calculateBondingCapital(Person person, Group group, SocialNetwork network)
    Calculates the "Bonding Social Capital" of a person within a specific group.
    static Real
    SocialCapitalModel.calculateBridgingCapital(Person person, Set<Group> primaryGroups, SocialNetwork network)
    Calculates the "Bridging Social Capital" of a person.
    static Real
    SocialCapitalModel.calculateSocialCohesion(Group group, SocialNetwork network)
    Estimates "Social Cohesion" of a group.
